action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline mean_r2=0.5206 with ptend_q=0.3227 as the main bottleneck. The zero_mask fix works well. Model is only ~17M params with room to grow. Analysis: Scaling up the model (hidden_dim 1024→1536, n_blocks 8→10), adding input skip connection, weighting ptend_q loss 2x, and training longer (30 epochs) should improve all feature groups, especially ptend_q. Decision: Implement larger model with skip connection and feature-weighted loss, train for 30 epochs, then submit eval.
